name: Cherry Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and margarine together until smooth.
2. Add the egg to the mixture and stir well.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. In a separate bowl, mix the juice from the cherries with milk.
5. Alternately add portions of the cherry-milk mixture and the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture, adding chopped cherries and nuts with each portion.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
